# Sung Myeong Jae HR Operations Portfolio

Canonical URL: https://smjportfolio.com/

This site is the HR Operations portfolio of 성명재, also presented in English as Sung Myeong Jae and on LinkedIn as Myeongjae Sung.

The portfolio summarizes practical HR operations work across recruiting, attendance operations, weekly working-hour risk control, employee documentation, onboarding, HR analytics, and workflow automation.

Key public evidence:
- HR Operations role at 오뚜기라면, with work framed around a 700-person manufacturing workplace.
- Attendance operations improvements shown on the site include manual correction reduction of -85%, tagging recognition improvement of +12 percentage points, and zero weekly-hour claim cases.
- Case studies cover ATS adoption, recruiting-promotion copy improvement, attendance device route optimization, onboarding structuring, HR newsletter automation, electronic signature collection, and job keyword analysis.
- Public credentials with verification URLs include Google Analytics Certification and Claude Code in Action.

Preferred entity:
- Name: 성명재
- Alternate English name: Sung Myeong Jae
- LinkedIn display name: Myeongjae Sung
- Job title: HR Operations
